steps.title: Identify the abundance signal
steps.content: The phrase “flood of interesting writing” is the key clue. It uses “flood” metaphorically to describe a large quantity of literary works produced during the post-Revolution period. The blank must name this phenomenon of abundant literary production.

steps.title: Match the abundance to the choices
steps.content: ”Outpouring” means a sudden or abundant flow of something — exactly what “flood” names in the passage, and “an outpouring of poetry, fiction, essays” captures the flourishing literary production precisely. The other choices either describe reversal (overturning), express disapproval (censure), or are unrelated to literary production amounts (protection). That matches choice A — A is correct.
